testcase.classname: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should translate a simple key in English
testcase.name: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should translate a simple key in English

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should translate a simple key in Indonesian
testcase.name: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should translate a simple key in Indonesian

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should translate nested keys
testcase.name: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should translate nested keys

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should fallback to English for missing Indonesian key
testcase.name: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should fallback to English for missing Indonesian key

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should return key path if not found
testcase.name: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should return key path if not found

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should use current locale if not specified
testcase.name: i18n Utilities t() - Translation should use current locale if not specified

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities setLocale / getLocale should set and get locale
testcase.name: i18n Utilities setLocale / getLocale should set and get locale

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities getTranslations should return all translations for a namespace
testcase.name: i18n Utilities getTranslations should return all translations for a namespace

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities getTranslations should return Indonesian translations
testcase.name: i18n Utilities getTranslations should return Indonesian translations

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities getTranslations should return empty object for invalid namespace
testcase.name: i18n Utilities getTranslations should return empty object for invalid namespace

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities detectLocale should detect Indonesian from Accept-Language
testcase.name: i18n Utilities detectLocale should detect Indonesian from Accept-Language

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities detectLocale should detect English as default
testcase.name: i18n Utilities detectLocale should detect English as default

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities detectLocale should default to English for no header
testcase.name: i18n Utilities detectLocale should default to English for no header

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities detectLocale should default to English for empty string
testcase.name: i18n Utilities detectLocale should default to English for empty string

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities LOCALE_NAMES should have English name
testcase.name: i18n Utilities LOCALE_NAMES should have English name

testcase.classname: i18n Utilities LOCALE_NAMES should have Indonesian name
testcase.name: i18n Utilities LOCALE_NAMES should have Indonesian name

testcase.classname: Error Utilities AppError should create an error with status code and code
testcase.name: Error Utilities AppError should create an error with status code and code

testcase.classname: Error Utilities AppError should be an instance of Error
testcase.name: Error Utilities AppError should be an instance of Error

testcase.classname: Error Utilities NotFoundError should create a 404 error with resource name
testcase.name: Error Utilities NotFoundError should create a 404 error with resource name

testcase.classname: Error Utilities NotFoundError should include resource ID in message
testcase.name: Error Utilities NotFoundError should include resource ID in message

testcase.classname: Error Utilities ValidationError should create a 400 error with field errors
testcase.name: Error Utilities ValidationError should create a 400 error with field errors

testcase.classname: Error Utilities ValidationError should create a 400 error with string message
testcase.name: Error Utilities ValidationError should create a 400 error with string message

testcase.classname: Error Utilities UnauthorizedError should create a 401 error with default message
testcase.name: Error Utilities UnauthorizedError should create a 401 error with default message

testcase.classname: Error Utilities UnauthorizedError should accept custom message
testcase.name: Error Utilities UnauthorizedError should accept custom message

testcase.classname: Error Utilities ForbiddenError should create a 403 error
testcase.name: Error Utilities ForbiddenError should create a 403 error

testcase.classname: Error Utilities ConflictError should create a 409 error
testcase.name: Error Utilities ConflictError should create a 409 error

testcase.classname: Error Utilities RateLimitError should create a 429 error
testcase.name: Error Utilities RateLimitError should create a 429 error

testcase.classname: Error Utilities successResponse should create a success response
testcase.name: Error Utilities successResponse should create a success response

testcase.classname: Error Utilities successResponse should include meta when provided
testcase.name: Error Utilities successResponse should include meta when provided

testcase.classname: Error Utilities errorResponse should create an error response
testcase.name: Error Utilities errorResponse should create an error response

testcase.classname: Error Utilities errorResponse should include field errors for ValidationError
testcase.name: Error Utilities errorResponse should include field errors for ValidationError

testcase.classname: Error Utilities buildMeta should build pagination meta
testcase.name: Error Utilities buildMeta should build pagination meta

testcase.name: Error Utilities buildMeta should handle zero total

testcase.classname: Cart Store addItem should add a new item to the cart
testcase.name: Cart Store addItem should add a new item to the cart

testcase.classname: Cart Store addItem should increment quantity for existing item
testcase.name: Cart Store addItem should increment quantity for existing item

testcase.classname: Cart Store addItem should not exceed stock limit
testcase.name: Cart Store addItem should not exceed stock limit

testcase.classname: Cart Store addItem should add multiple different items
testcase.name: Cart Store addItem should add multiple different items

testcase.classname: Cart Store removeItem should remove an item from the cart
testcase.name: Cart Store removeItem should remove an item from the cart

testcase.classname: Cart Store removeItem should not affect other items when removing
testcase.name: Cart Store removeItem should not affect other items when removing

testcase.classname: Cart Store updateQuantity should update quantity of an item
testcase.name: Cart Store updateQuantity should update quantity of an item

testcase.classname: Cart Store updateQuantity should remove item when quantity is 0
testcase.name: Cart Store updateQuantity should remove item when quantity is 0

testcase.classname: Cart Store updateQuantity should remove item when quantity is negative
testcase.name: Cart Store updateQuantity should remove item when quantity is negative

testcase.classname: Cart Store updateQuantity should cap quantity at stock limit
testcase.name: Cart Store updateQuantity should cap quantity at stock limit

testcase.classname: Cart Store clearCart should clear all items
testcase.name: Cart Store clearCart should clear all items

testcase.classname: Cart Store Calculations should calculate subtotal correctly
testcase.name: Cart Store Calculations should calculate subtotal correctly

testcase.classname: Cart Store Calculations should calculate tax (11%) correctly
testcase.name: Cart Store Calculations should calculate tax (11%) correctly

testcase.classname: Cart Store Calculations should calculate total correctly
testcase.name: Cart Store Calculations should calculate total correctly

testcase.classname: Cart Store Calculations should return 0 for empty cart
testcase.name: Cart Store Calculations should return 0 for empty cart

testcase.classname: Cart Store getItemCount should count total items correctly
testcase.name: Cart Store getItemCount should count total items correctly

testcase.classname: Cart Store getItemCount should count quantities correctly
testcase.name: Cart Store getItemCount should count quantities correctly

testcase.classname: Cart Store setIsOpen should open and close the cart drawer
testcase.name: Cart Store setIsOpen should open and close the cart drawer

testcase.name: QRIS Service isConfigured should return false when env vars are missing

testcase.name: QRIS Service isConfigured should return true when env vars are set

testcase.name: QRIS Service generateQRISPayment should throw when not configured

testcase.name: Currency Utilities formatPrice should handle zero

testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should include storeId when provided

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for invalid token
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for invalid token

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for tampered token
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for tampered token

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for empty string
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for empty string

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for malformed token (2 parts)
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for malformed token (2 parts)

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for malformed token (4+ parts)
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for malformed token (4+ parts)

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for tokens with invalid JSON in body
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for tokens with invalid JSON in body

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for expired token
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should return null for expired token

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should produce different tokens for different payloads
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should produce different tokens for different payloads

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should produce different tokens for same payload (different iat)
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should produce different tokens for same payload (different iat)

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should handle special characters in payload
testcase.name: Auth Utilities JWT Signing and Verification should handle special characters in payload

testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should hash a password

testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should verify a correct password

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should reject an incorrect password
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should reject an incorrect password

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should produce different hashes for same password (different salts)
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should produce different hashes for same password (different salts)

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should handle empty password
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should handle empty password

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should handle very long passwords
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should handle very long passwords

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should handle unicode passwords
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Password Hashing should handle unicode passwords

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Refresh Token should generate a random refresh token
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Refresh Token should generate a random refresh token

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Refresh Token should always generate unique tokens
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Refresh Token should always generate unique tokens

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Refresh Token should only contain hex characters
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Refresh Token should only contain hex characters

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should extract token from Bearer header
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should extract token from Bearer header

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for missing header
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for missing header

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for non-Bearer header
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for non-Bearer header

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for malformed header (no token)
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for malformed header (no token)

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for empty string
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should return null for empty string

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should extract token with special characters
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should extract token with special characters

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should handle multiple spaces gracefully
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should handle multiple spaces gracefully

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should handle lowercase bearer
testcase.name: Auth Utilities extractTokenFromHeader should handle lowercase bearer

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Security Edge Cases should not accept tokens with null algorithm
testcase.name: Auth Utilities Security Edge Cases should not accept tokens with null algorithm

testcase.classname: Auth Utilities Security Edge Cases should detect signature tampering in payload section
